balanced_opportunist.description: No single dominant specialty, with a broad point-seeking profile across multiple race shapes.
balanced_opportunist.label: Balanced Opportunist

classic_specialist.description: Built mainly for one-day racing and selective classics.
classic_specialist.label: Pure Classics Specialist

classic_sprint_opportunist.description: Strong in one-day races and sprint-accessible opportunities, with limited GC emphasis.
classic_sprint_opportunist.label: Classics + Sprint Opportunist

gc_development.description: More aligned with stage-race structure and general classification ambitions.
gc_development.label: GC Development Team

sprint_first.description: Sprint-accessible races are the primary scoring lane.
sprint_first.label: Sprint-First Team

stage_hunter.description: More dangerous in stage-level opportunities than full GC campaigns.
stage_hunter.label: Stage Hunter

time_trial_edge.description: Has an outsized edge in TT-shaped scoring opportunities.
time_trial_edge.label: Time Trial Edge
